scripts.build: npm run build -w @realtimemail/sdk && npm run build -w @realtimemail/web-client
scripts.python:check: python -m compileall packages/python/src/realtime_mail && python scripts/validate-python-conformance.py && python scripts/test-python-gateway-profile.py
scripts.gateway:start: npm run build -w @realtimemail/sdk && npm run start -w @realtimemail/reference-gateway
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run conformance && npm run crypto:test && npm run security:test && npm run payment:attack-test && npm run web-client:state-test && npm run rabbitmq:test && npm run python:check && npm run go:check && npm run rust:check && npm run java:check && npm run csharp:conformance
